lineage.introduces: 1 further server-side override on top of acme: rate_limit 15→5 (tightened anti-abuse window)

flow01_resend_rate_limit_minutes.rationale: Northwind operates a tightly moderated guild and chose to further tighten the resend window from acme's 15 minutes down to 5 minutes; legitimate users almost never need to resend more than once per session and the tighter cap reduces noise from spam-driven retries. This is a server-side rate-limit only — invocation lives at EmailVerificationService.getResendLimitMinutes.

flow01_invitation_inviter_name.rationale: Inherited unchanged from acme-pro-members v1.0.1 fork. Northwind guild communicates under acme's branded invitation copy because it operates as a shared-onboarding consortium under the acme parent program; the invitation surface is intentionally identical.

flow01_invitation_community_name.rationale: Inherited unchanged from acme-pro-members v1.0.1 fork. See `flow01_invitation_inviter_name` rationale.

flow01_email_verification_ttl_seconds.rationale: Inherited unchanged from acme-pro-members v1.0.1 fork. Northwind's stricter resend cadence (5 minutes) pairs with acme's stricter token TTL (1h) for a coherent anti-abuse profile.

deploymentInstructions.seedMethod: IFreedomConfigService.set() per key, within tenant's AsyncLocalStorage context
deploymentInstructions.sampleSeedScript: for (const [key, cfg] of Object.entries(overrides)) { await cls.runWith({ tenantId }, () => freedomConfig.set(key, cfg.value)); }

verificationContract.note: Same Layer-1 contract as acme — proves each override key returns the active value (in northwind context: rate_limit=5; inherited keys=acme values) and the default for non-cascade tenants.

machineInvariantsPreserved: Event names: AccountCreated, VerificationEmailRequested, VerificationCompleted, OnboardingCompleted
Material type literals: workspace_setup, flow_tutorial, community_invitation
Idempotency key format and outbox ordering (storeDocument before enqueue)

v15DriftContract.expectedDrift: 0 px on every PNG (byte-identical to platform-source baseline AND to tenant-a-acme-v1.0.1 capture)
v15DriftContract.rationale: All 4 active overrides are server-side-only; northwind's rate_limit tightening (15→5) lives exclusively in EmailVerificationService.getResendLimitMinutes and never appears on any of the 6 client kiosk pages
v15DriftContract.observedDrift: 0 px (V-15 instance B drift comparison: 252/252 byte-identical pairs vs row 5 tenant-b-northwind-installed-v1.0.1; PASS per contract component 1)

connections.$comment: Per-tenant CI/CD connection config (Phase C12, DEV-115, 2026-04-26) — schema per TENANT-CICD-CONNECTION-GUIDANCE-v1.0 §TENANT PROFILE SCHEMA. connectionVerified=false is the initial state; ForkFlowHandlerService's Step-0 preflight sets it to true and writes lastVerifiedAt when the checkConnection() call returns reachable=true + hasRepoScope=true. If a fork session reads connectionVerified=false it MUST run the preflight before proceeding (Rule F-1).
